description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define variables REGISTRY and CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE, and a before_script that logs into the GitLab registry and computes BASE_VERSION, MINOR_VERSION, MAJOR_VERSION, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, CONTAINER_VERSION_IMAGE, CONTAINER_MINOR_VERSION_IMAGE, and CONTAINER_MAJOR_VERSION_IMAGE. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .` and `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`. Add a lint job in the test stage that runs `docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE` then `docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE npm run lint`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE` then `docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE npm test`. Add a release-latest job in the release stage that only runs on the master branch, pulls the test image, tags it as $CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE and pushes it. Add a release-version job in the release stage that only runs on tags, pulls the test image, tags it as $CONTAINER_VERSION_IMAGE, $CONTAINER_MINOR_VERSION_IMAGE, $CONTAINER_MAJOR_VERSION_IMAGE and pushes each.
